payload.description: Ultrasonic Rail Testing - 3 runs/year mainline; 2 runs/year Class 2 and Class 1 Track w/in Yard Limits. Staff at Sperry evaluate and report anomalies within 24 hrs. Verification Testing within 84 hrs.
Track Geometry Vehicle Testing over entire LIRR territory - 4 runs/year mainline; 2 runs/year yard. Records gage, profile, alinement characteristics, platform/tunnel clearances, rail profile, video.

records.display_name: MOWIC/TCIC2020 Maintenance of Way Inspection Car

payload.description: Self-propelled inspection car commissioned in 2020. Capable to operate certain systems at 50 MPH (25MPH for GRMS). Includes RPMS, GRMS, TCIS, JBIS, RQMS, RCMS, CMS, DVIS, TRMS, OWMS, OWIS.
Rail Flaw testing required by CFR §213.237 annually for Class 3 track and above. MNR performs 2+ runs yearly using continuous testing program adopted in 2021.
payload.locations: MNR system - Class 3 track and above

locations_normalized.raw_text: MNR system - Class 3 track and above

payload.description: Weekly Visual Inspection performed by 49CFR213 Qualified Track Inspectors. Physical walking of the system to inspect track; Hi-rail Inspection permitted option to walking. Defects identified required to be corrected either immediately or within 30 days.
Autonomous systems on three MNR Revenue cars (M7, M8, Shoreliner). Run over 80 percent of territory. Monitor gage, warp, crosslevel, profile, runoff, alignment per MW-4 standards.

payload.description: Monthly Switch Inspection of 692 switches excluding yards. Joint Inspections with Signal Department. Defects corrected immediately, within 30 days, or monitored.
